Amnesia: Partial or total loss of memory
Rich IVRY
Retrograde: Memory for events prior to neurological disturbance
Anterograde: Memory for events since neurological disturbance
-- A learning deficit.
"Momento" 2000 movie
Video clip of Clive (encephalitis case; 20 years post-injury;
living at rehab center)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Vwigmktix2Y
0:46 - 1:58
